title: Classic Saudi Arabian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from Saudi Arabia, made with tender chicken, sweet dates, and a rich spice blend.

ingredients.name: Arabian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of ghee or oil in the bottom of a large clay or ceramic tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they start to soften, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the Arabian spice blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the dates and enough water to cover the chicken and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with additional dates and onions if desired.
